CustomField.description: Number of days to retain successfully synced (StatusPk__c='Synced') SyncItem ledger rows before auto-purge. Defaults to 30 when blank. Only applies when EnableSyncItemCleanupDateTime__c is set — the purge never touches Staged/Queued/Pending/Failed rows.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: How many days to keep successfully synced ledger rows before automatic cleanup (default 30). Only Synced rows are ever purged.
CustomField.label: Sync Item Retention Days
